claim_boundary: Available-provider triangulation manifest only. Model-only, not human gold-label review. No live QBS scored run and no public QBS quality claim.
method_boundary: Uses Alibaba/OpenAI/DeepSeek provider lanes already available to the operator. This reduces single-model Alibaba/qwen-turbo self-confirmation risk but retains reviewer provider overlap because OpenAI and DeepSeek are also reviewer providers.

models.reviewer_overlap_boundary: Provider overlaps with benchmarked Alibaba lane, but model differs from prior qwen-turbo adjudicator and benchmarked qwen-turbo lane.
Provider overlaps with OpenAI reviewer lane, but model differs from reviewer gpt-4o-mini.
Provider overlaps with DeepSeek reviewer lane, but model differs from reviewer deepseek-chat. DeepSeek aliases are time-sensitive and must be rechecked before future reruns.
